nodes.label: Arena Allocator
nodes.rationale: Uses arena memory allocator for fast allocation and grouped deallocation, eliminating the complexity of manual malloc/free pairs.

nodes.label: M16 Backend Contract
nodes.rationale: Decouples the parser/IR layer from target-specific generation by standardizing callbacks for width mapping, register mapping, CC information, and function emission.

nodes.label: Native Mach-O Object Production
nodes.rationale: Implements native Mach-O (.o) generation for Apple Silicon (arm64-darwin) by parsing GNU AS syntax and assembling instructions using a minimal table-driven encoder.
